deviation.non_conformance_type: Document control / uncontrolled missing controlled copy of approved vendor list (AVL) and related SOP in production department
deviation.non_conformance_summary: A controlled copy of the approved vendor list for primary packaging material was not retrieved after revision and was later found missing in the production office, indicating a document control lapse.

temporal_events.description: Controlled copy No. 5 of AVL/PM/001-000 was issued to production department in the open office of the drug product unit.
Unavailability of the primary packaging material AVL was confirmed after searching for the missing document.
The department head was informed of the missing AVL.
Controlled copy of SOP/DP/QA/045-R00 was issued to production department.
Missing controlled copy of SOP/DP/QA/045-R00 (cleaning validation SOP) was identified during review of other issued controlled copies.
AVL for primary packaging material was revised under change control CCF/QA/24/044.
Revised controlled copy AVL/PM/001-001 was distributed to production department.

locations.room_name: Open office of drug product unit

sop_requirements.title: Document and Data Control
sop_requirements.requirement_text: During distribution of the revised version copy, old version shall be retrieved from user department.

sop_requirements.title: Approved Vendor List control
sop_requirements.requirement_text: After revision of approved vendor list, controlled copy shall be issued to applicable departments and old revision copies retrieved.

sop_requirements.title: Approved Vendor List control
sop_requirements.requirement_text: Superseded copy shall be retrieved after issue of the revised controlled copy.

sop_requirements.title: Document and Data Control
sop_requirements.requirement_text: Referenced as the governing document control procedure for this deviation.

observed_vs_expected.expected_value_or_range: Old/superseded controlled copy retrieved from user department upon distribution of revised copy
observed_vs_expected.observed_value: Old controlled copy of AVL/PM/001-000 was not retrieved because it was missing / not available

observed_vs_expected.expected_value_or_range: Designated place for document storage available; documents kept under controlled access
observed_vs_expected.observed_value: No designated place / no lock and key provision; file kept on table / for common use in production office GF-95
Controlled copy of AVL and SOP/DP/QA/045-R00 became misplaced / not found during search

products_materials.name: Approved Vendor List for primary packaging material
products_materials.storage_condition: Controlled document issued to production department

products_materials.name: AVL/PM/001-000
products_materials.storage_condition: Kept in production office file / table

products_materials.name: SOP/DP/QA/045-R00
products_materials.storage_condition: Kept in SOP file in production office

steps.why_question: Why was the controlled copy of AVL for PPM (AVL/PM/001-000) not retrieved?
steps.answer: Because the AVL for PPM (AVL/PM/001-000) was not available.

steps.why_question: Why was AVL for PPM (AVL/PM/001-000) not available?
Why was AVL for PPM (AVL/PM/001-000) misplaced?
steps.answer: Because a designated place for document storage was not available.

causal_chain.conclusion: The document was not retrieved because it was misplaced due to the absence of a designated storage location, enabling shared handling by multiple personnel and loss of control.

impact_assessments.justification_summary: The issue is limited to document handling; master documents remain in QA and no data were recorded on the missing copies, so system control and records integrity were not materially affected.
impact_assessments.key_evidence: Master copy in place with QA; no data recorded on missing documents.

impact_assessments.justification_summary: The controlled copy became misplaced in the production office because there was no designated storage location and the file was used by multiple persons, meaning document control requirements were not maintained.
impact_assessments.key_evidence: Controlled copies missing in production office GF-95; no lock/key provision.

impact_assessments.justification_summary: The deviation concerns document availability only; there is no evidence of product data loss or product processing error, and the master copy remained available with QA.
impact_assessments.key_evidence: No data recorded on missing documents; master copy in QA.

impact_assessments.justification_summary: The event does not involve equipment or equipment settings.
No batch records or patient-related data were impacted, and the event is confined to document misplacement with no historical batch issue identified.
impact_assessments.key_evidence: No data recorded on documents; master copies available.

corrective_actions.description: Inform Production Head and QA Head and initiate deviation DEV/PR/24/016.
Provide awareness training to all concerned personnel regarding deviation DEV/PR/24/016 and document handling expectations.
Issue an additional controlled copy of SOP for cleaning validation (SOP/DP/QA/046-R00 as written in report) from QA.

preventive_actions.description: Keep document files in a locker with lock-and-key provision to prevent uncontrolled access and misplacement.
preventive_actions.scope: Production document storage / document file handling
preventive_actions.linked_root_cause: Responsibility boundaries ineffective / designated storage not available

recurrence_history.previous_capa_description: A similar document-control issue was identified for SOP/DP/QA/045-R00 (cleaning validation SOP) being missing from production file handling.
recurrence_history.reason_for_recurrence: Controlled copies were kept in a common file/table in the production office with no lock-and-key or designated storage, allowing multiple-person use and misplacement.
